testcase.name: test_user_login

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkaXBhbGlAY2x1YmNvbmNpZXJnZS5pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcxNTY1MjI0fQ.2bWodzoGQXuSt50G8zqUJtF6m0rvExPjf55Jkdw_wbY', 'message': 'Login successful', 'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'token_type': 'bearer', ...}

testcase.name: test_emergency_chocolate_ingestion
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:104: in test_emergency_chocolate_ingestion assert response.status_code == 200, f"Chat failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Chat failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","message"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"input":"my dog ate chocolate","pet_context":{"id":"demo","name":"Test Dog"},"conversation_history":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_emergency_gagging
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:149: in test_emergency_gagging assert response.status_code == 200, f"Chat failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Chat failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","message"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"input":"my dog is gagging after eating something","pet_context":{"id":"demo","name":"Test Dog"},"conversation_history":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_emergency_choking
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:183: in test_emergency_choking assert response.status_code == 200, f"Chat failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Chat failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","message"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"input":"my dog is choking and can't breathe","pet_context":{"id":"demo","name":"Test Dog"},"conversation_history":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_emergency_vomiting_blood
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:219: in test_emergency_vomiting_blood assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_paw_points_balance
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:260: in test_get_paw_points_balance assert response.status_code == 200, f"Balance API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Balance API failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_paw_points_history
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:279: in test_get_paw_points_history assert response.status_code == 200, f"History API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: History API failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_reward_catalog
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:301: in test_get_reward_catalog assert response.status_code == 200, f"Catalog API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Catalog API failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_sync_achievements_idempotent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_logic_card_verification.py:431: in test_sync_achievements_idempotent assert response1.status_code == 200, f"Sync failed: {response1.text}" E AssertionError: Sync failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
